field.label: Enabled
field.help: Enable DDNS server. To send updates to an authoritative nameserver, configure Dynamic DNS inside the DHCPv4 and DHCPv6 subnets.

field.label: Bind address
field.help: Address on which the DHCP DDNS server interface should be available.

field.label: Bind port
field.help: Portnumber to use for the DHCP DDNS server interface.
